config.installCommand: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: installing requirements.base.txt' && python -m pip install -r requirements.base.txt --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary || (echo 'pip install failed' && exit 1) && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: forcing Jinja2 PyJWT SQLAlchemy install' && python -m pip install Jinja2 PyJWT SQLAlchemy --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary || echo 'force-install failed' && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: pip freeze output' && python -m pip freeze
